title: The Climate Book
author: Greta Thunberg
subline: The facts, the systems, the choices we still have.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A temperature gauge: a vertical hairline column with degree ticks from 0 to 40, a curving red mercury column rising. The 1.5°C mark is the warning line. Title sits overlaid. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- The gauge tube (vertical, with a bulb at the bottom) -->
    <line x1="-300" y1="-400" x2="-300" y2="400" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <line x1="-340" y1="-400" x2="-340" y2="400" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <ellipse cx="-320" cy="400" rx="60" ry="80" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <ellipse cx="-320" cy="400" rx="40" ry="60" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- The mercury (red column) -->
    <rect x="-310" y="100" width="20" height="300" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <rect x="-310" y="100" width="20" height="300" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Degree ticks (faint) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5">
      <line x1="-340" y1="-400" x2="-380" y2="-400"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-300" x2="-380" y2="-300"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-200" x2="-380" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-100" x2="-380" y2="-100"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="0" x2="-380" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="100" x2="-380" y2="100"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="200" x2="-380" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="300" x2="-380" y2="300"/>
    </g>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="-390" y="-396">40°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="-296">35°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="-196">30°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="-96">25°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="4">20°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="104">15°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="204">10°</text>
      <text x="-390" y="304">5°</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The 1.5°C WARNING LINE — a red horizontal line + label -->
    <line x1="-380" y1="-100" x2="600" y2="-100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
    <text x="600" y="-105" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="0.2em">1.5°C LIMIT</text>
    <!-- A small red dot at the current temperature marker -->
    <circle cx="-300" cy="100" r="6" fill="#0a0a0a"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A literal thermometer: vertical column, degree ticks from 5° to 40°, red mercury rising. A dashed red horizontal line marks '1.5°C LIMIT' — the climate target. The mercury is shown at the 1.5° mark, trembling at the line. Title sits overlaid in the middle, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand '1.5°C' in the top-left; pill 'NOW' at the top — the urgency. The cover IS the climate warning.
